title: Blue's Epic Items
description: This mod adds alot of items and advancements to your game including helpful items!
body:
# 📖 What does this mod add to my game?
**This mod adds tons of new things! Why not craft a transmitter to send messages to notch? Or craft a BulkLight and blind your enemies, or use the red and bright Laser Pointer? Lets check out our dimension with loads and loads of ancient debris? Im gonna be rich! Why not banish your least favorite mob with the Crucifix also?**

# 📷 Why should I download this?
**Well this mod is primarily for fun or overpowered things, just for your enjoyment!**

# 🖥️ Do I need a client like Optifine or Sodium?
**Sodium or Optifine are not required for this mod to load or work**
